ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "health_department_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the state's health department */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "discharged_cases" INTEGER /* Number of discharged cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "cases_under_investigation" INTEGER /* Number of cases under investigation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health department */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the health department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the health department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the health department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the health department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_departments_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., PPE, ventilators, test kits) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of resource allocation */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, vaccination drive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intervention record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intervention record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user accessed data for */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, monthly analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high case rate, resource shortage) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases at the time */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases at the time */,
  "discharged_cases" INTEGER /* Number of discharged cases at the time */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths at the time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of resource allocated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_outcomes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_outcomes_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, report) */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification entry */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES notification_subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)
